title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas & Andrew Hunt
description: A guide to becoming a better software craftsperson through practical advice and timeless principles.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: An exploration of the two systems that drive the way we think and make decisions.

title: The Design of Everyday Things
author: Don Norman
description: A fundamental look at how design shapes human behavior and how good design makes things intuitive.

title: Visualization Analysis and Design
author: Tamara Munzner
description: A systematic approach to building and evaluating visualizations using the nested model framework.
